attempts.strategy: Build the R(T)-module structure on Hom(M,N) of presheaves of modules over a base with terminal object T (homModule), scalar f acts by post-composition with globalSMul f.
attempts.code_tried: noncomputable def homModule (M N : PresheafOfModules (R ⋙ forget₂ CommRingCat RingCat)) : Module (R.obj (op T)) (M ⟶ N) where smul f φ := φ ≫ globalSMul hT N f; add_smul ...
attempts.insight: Module axioms reduce to four globalSMul_{one,zero,add,mul} ring-hom facts + Preadditive bilinearity of composition. Built in full generality for any base category C with terminal object.

attempts.strategy: Specialise homModule to the slice value: M|_U via pushforward0 along Over.forget U; over-category terminal Over.mk(id U) has ring R(U) by rfl.
attempts.code_tried: noncomputable def internalHomObjModule (U : C) (M N : ...) : Module (R.obj (op U)) (M.restr U ⟶ N.restr U) := homModule (Over.mkIdTerminal U) ...; def restr U := pushforward0 (Over.forget U) ...
attempts.insight: internalHomObjModule realises exactly the per-object VALUE of def:presheaf_internal_hom. NOT the naive contravariant U↦Hom_{R(U)}(M(U),N(U)) — the slice/over-category formula is the blueprint-mandated covariant remedy.
